description: Build or renovate — put up walls, lay floors, reshape your home.

args.name: sim_id
args.description: PersistID (ActorUID) of the Sim performing the action

args.name: guid
args.description: Catalog GUID of the object to buy (for buy)

args.name: object_id
args.description: Runtime ObjectID of the target entity (for move/delete)

args.name: cleanup_all
args.description: Delete the full multitile group (for delete)

args.name: x
args.description: Tile x in 1/16 units for buy/move; integer tiles for architecture

args.name: y
args.description: Tile y in 1/16 units for buy/move; integer tiles for architecture

args.name: dir
args.description: Direction enum byte (NORTH=1, EAST=4, SOUTH=16, WEST=64)

args.name: size
args.description: Lot size index into BuildableSizes (for lot-size)

args.name: ops
args.description: Architecture ops. Each op: {kind, x, y, level, x2?, y2?, pattern?, style?}. kind is one of: wall_line, wall_delete, wall_rect, pattern_dot, pattern_fill, floor_rect, floor_fill (aliases: place_wall -> wall_line, place_floor -> floor_rect). For WALL_LINE: x2=length, y2=direction. For RECT forms: x2,y2=width,height. For PATTERN_DOT: x2=side (0-5). pattern is the catalog pattern id; style is the wall-style byte.
